calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the Petitioner.

Mr. Ferdon spoke about the bond fee, fee issues, the decedents home and referred the examiners to the conservatorship file. He also reported that the son wanted all the personal property, and that the two automobiles had no value. The Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: T. Bonner.
